projectDescription: An automated Node.js trading bot for Polymarket that supports both BTC Up/Down arbitrage and copy-trading modes on the Polygon blockchain.
keyFeatures: BTC Up/Down 5-minute market arbitrage with dual-sided limit ladder posting
Copy-trading mode that mirrors any target Polymarket wallet's buy orders
Multiple sizing modes: FIXED, MIRROR (1:1), and RATIO (percentage)
Multi-layered risk controls: per-trade, per-market, hourly, and total spend caps
Circuit breakers: inventory imbalance halt, combined-ask stop, hourly loss limit
Automatic CLOB API credential derivation from wallet private key
Real-time WebSocket order book feed with REST polling fallback
On-chain position merging and redemption after market resolution
Dry-run mode for safe copy-trader testing without real orders
Winston-based dual logging to console (color-coded) and bot.log file
publicApiSurface: npm run copy — launch copy trader (TRADING_MODE=copy)
npm run dev — arb bot with auto-restart on file changes
npm run copy:dev — copy trader with auto-restart
node src/copy/index.js — standalone copy trader entry point
Trader class (src/trader.js) — per-market arb state machine
CopyTrader class (src/copy/copyTrader.js) — copy trade execution engine
PnlTracker class (src/pnl.js) — session P&L and circuit breaker
